title: Medical Coder
description: Bristol-Myers Squibb is seeking a Medical Coder to translate clinical documentation into accurate medical codes. You'll ensure proper coding for diagnosis, procedures, and treatments while maintaining compliance with coding standards. Work hybrid in Milwaukee for a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative medicines.
responsibilities: Review medical documentation and assign appropriate diagnostic and procedural codes
Ensure coding accuracy and compliance with ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding standards
Verify insurance coverage and resolve coding discrepancies
Maintain detailed coding records and documentation
Participate in coding audits and quality assurance reviews

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; medical coding program certificate preferred
skills: ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding knowledge
